final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system showcase featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimal tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple panels: web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and UI controls arranged in a system overview layout
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - Web Dashboard (full layout)
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components (multiple variants)
  - Button components (multiple states)
  - UI controls / widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a dark tech-oriented backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-contrast atmosphere with strong sense of depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact hues and accent ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, layered surface treatment with a sense of depth — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five component categories visible and legible; must convey rich visual hierarchy and strong tech feel
Avoid:
